predictions.text: EASA will publish a Conflict Zone Information Bulletin (CZIB) or Safety Information Bulletin advising European operators to avoid (or apply special risk mitigations for) airspace over Iran and/or Iraq due to the U.S.–Iran conflict escalation.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if EASA posts a CZIB/SIB on its official site explicitly referencing Iran and/or Iraq airspace risk tied to the current conflict, dated on or before 2026-03-31.
evidence: Middle East airspace disruptions could reroute global flights, raising costs and delays (MarketWatch, 2026-02-28): https://www.marketwatch.com/story/middle-eastern-airports-are-crossroads-of-the-world-heres-how-the-u-s-israel-attack-on-iran-will-sow-chaos-on-air-travel-3f34465d
U.S.-led strikes on Iran raise escalation risk and uncertainty (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/world/middleeast/iran-attacks-what-to-know.html
monitoring_signals: EASA CZIB/SIB updates page and RSS/email alerts
Eurocontrol network operations updates referencing Iran/Iraq avoidance
Major European carrier route suspensions or reroutes (Lufthansa/IAG/Air France-KLM) citing conflict-zone risk
predictions.rationale: Conflict-zone advisories are a common near-term regulatory response when regional airspace risks rise and reroutings become widespread.

predictions.text: At least one of Delta, United, or American will suspend all scheduled passenger flights to at least one of Dubai (DXB), Doha (DOH), or Abu Dhabi (AUH) for 7 consecutive calendar days.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if flight schedules and/or airline advisories (or a major flight-data provider summary) show zero operated flights by DL/UA/AA to at least one of DXB/DOH/AUH for a continuous 7-day period ending on or before 2026-04-30, with the airline not operating any passenger service on that route during the interval.
evidence: Middle East airspace disruptions could reroute global flights and raise costs (MarketWatch, 2026-02-28): https://www.marketwatch.com/story/middle-eastern-airports-are-crossroads-of-the-world-heres-how-the-u-s-israel-attack-on-iran-will-sow-chaos-on-air-travel-3f34465d
monitoring_signals: Airline travel waivers and route advisories (DL/UA/AA investor relations and travel updates)
FlightAware/Flightradar24 route activity for DXB/DOH/AUH
FAA international flight advisories and NOTAMs affecting Gulf routings
predictions.rationale: Extended airspace closures/reroutes often force temporary route suspensions to Gulf hubs when risk and operating costs spike.

predictions.text: The Lloyd’s Market Association Joint War Committee (JWC) will add the Strait of Hormuz and/or adjacent waters of the Persian Gulf to its Listed Areas (or issue a circular materially expanding the listed area boundary to cover it).
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if an official JWC Listed Areas update/circular published on or before 2026-06-30 explicitly lists the Strait of Hormuz and/or expands a listed-area polygon/boundary that clearly includes the strait.
evidence: Markets focus on oil supply and shipping chokepoints; Iran conflict adds inflation tail risk (CNBC, 2026-02-28): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/28/iran-us-attack-oil-market-economy.html
monitoring_signals: LMA/JWC Listed Areas circulars and updates
War-risk premium changes for Gulf transits reported by major marine insurers/brokers
Reports of tanker incidents, seizures, or escort operations near Hormuz
predictions.rationale: A sustained escalation that increases maritime incident risk commonly leads to war-risk reclassification and expanded listed areas.

predictions.text: BLS will report the CPI-U gasoline index rising at least +10.0% month-over-month in at least one monthly CPI release.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if any BLS CPI release dated on or before 2026-08-31 shows the CPI-U Gasoline (All Types) index with a seasonally adjusted month-over-month change of +10.0% or higher (per BLS tables).
evidence: Iran conflict adds inflation tail risk via energy prices and risk premia (CNBC, 2026-02-28): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/28/iran-us-attack-oil-market-economy.html
monitoring_signals: Weekly U.S. retail gasoline prices (AAA) and wholesale gasoline cracks
EIA weekly petroleum status report (gasoline stocks, refinery utilization)
WTI/Brent moves and implied volatility during escalation events
predictions.rationale: Large MoM gasoline CPI spikes require sharp pump-price moves; plausible under escalation but still a tail outcome.

predictions.text: At least one FOMC post-meeting statement will explicitly mention “oil prices” or “energy prices” as a factor in the inflation outlook (using those words).
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if any FOMC statement released on or before 2026-09-30 contains the phrase “oil prices” or “energy prices” in the context of inflation/outlook assessment.
evidence: Iran conflict increases inflation tail risk and uncertainty (CNBC, 2026-02-28): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/28/iran-us-attack-oil-market-economy.html
monitoring_signals: FOMC statements and press-conference transcripts
Fed Beige Book references to energy costs
Market-based inflation expectations (5y5y, breakevens) responding to oil
predictions.rationale: If energy becomes a prominent inflation driver, the FOMC often acknowledges it directly in statements.

predictions.text: The U.S. House of Representatives will hold a recorded roll-call vote on a War Powers Resolution (or analogous privileged measure) specifically regarding U.S. military action against Iran.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if the House Clerk roll-call vote records show a vote on a War Powers Resolution (or privileged measure explicitly invoking the War Powers framework) that references Iran in the text/title, on or before 2026-04-30.
evidence: Trump’s Iran strike decision opens political fissures and oversight conflict (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/us/politics/trump-iran-attack-midterms.html
U.S.-led strikes on Iran raise escalation risk (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/world/middleeast/iran-attacks-what-to-know.html
monitoring_signals: House Rules/Foreign Affairs committee schedules and filings
Congress.gov text introduction of Iran-related War Powers measures
Statements from House leadership indicating intent to force a vote
predictions.rationale: High-salience strikes frequently trigger House War Powers action, even if outcomes are uncertain.

predictions.text: At least one U.S. state will enact (bill signed) or formally file in federal court a new congressional district map explicitly described by major outlets as a response to the Supreme Court Voting Rights Act ruling.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if, on or before 2026-07-31, (a) a governor signs a redistricting bill creating a new congressional map, or (b) a state files a new congressional map with a federal court, and at least two major national outlets (e.g., NYT/WSJ/WaPo/AP/Reuters) explicitly link the action to the Supreme Court Voting Rights Act ruling.
evidence: Supreme Court Voting Rights Act ruling could reshape district maps and turnout incentives (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/us/politics/supreme-court-voting-rights-act-midterms.html
monitoring_signals: State legislative calendars in VRA-impacted states
Federal court docket activity in major redistricting cases
Public statements by state AGs/legislative leaders citing the ruling
predictions.rationale: Major VRA rulings often catalyze map changes ahead of the next election cycle, especially in closely watched states.

predictions.text: The UN Security Council will hold an emergency meeting (public or closed consultations) specifically on Afghanistan–Pakistan cross-border hostilities, with an official UN meeting record/press readout.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if, on or before 2026-05-31, the UN posts a Security Council meeting entry, agenda item, or official press readout indicating a meeting/consultations focused on Afghanistan–Pakistan cross-border hostilities (or equivalent wording).
evidence: Afghanistan–Pakistan conflict lacks clear endgame; persistent cross-border militancy risks regional instability (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/world/asia/afghanistan-pakistan-war-taliban.html
monitoring_signals: UN Security Council programme of work updates
Reuters/AP reporting on UNSC consultations on Afghanistan/Pakistan
Major escalation events: cross-border strikes, large-casualty incidents, mass displacement
predictions.rationale: UNSC emergency sessions are a common diplomatic response once cross-border fighting becomes sustained or politically salient.

predictions.text: The U.S. Department of Defense (or U.S. Central Command) will publicly announce a named maritime security operation/task force aimed at protecting commercial shipping in/near the Strait of Hormuz.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if an official DoD/CENTCOM press release, briefing, or website post on or before 2026-06-30 announces the formation/activation of a named operation or task force with stated mission to protect/escort commercial shipping in/near the Strait of Hormuz.
evidence: Markets focus on shipping chokepoints; Iran conflict adds tail risks (CNBC, 2026-02-28): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/28/iran-us-attack-oil-market-economy.html
U.S.-led strikes on Iran raise escalation risk (NYT, 2026-02-28): https://www.nytimes.com/2026/02/28/world/middleeast/iran-attacks-what-to-know.html
monitoring_signals: CENTCOM press releases and briefings
US Navy/5th Fleet announcements on convoying and force posture
Spikes in maritime incidents and merchant-ship advisories (UKMTO/IMB)
predictions.rationale: If threat levels rise around a major chokepoint, the U.S. often formalizes protective posture via named operations/task forces.

predictions.text: Berkshire Hathaway will report at least $3.0 billion of share repurchases in at least one quarterly Form 10-Q/10-K covering results through Q3 2026.
predictions.verification_criteria: Resolves TRUE if Berkshire’s repurchase disclosure (in a 10-Q/10-K filed on or before 2026-11-15 for quarters ended 2026-03-31, 06-30, or 09-30) reports purchases of Berkshire shares of $3.0B or more during that quarter.
evidence: Berkshire operating earnings fell sharply; leadership transition emphasizes capital allocation (CNBC, 2026-02-28): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/02/28/berkshire-hathaway-brka-q4-2025-earnings.html
monitoring_signals: BRK 10-Q/10-K repurchase footnotes and cash-balance trends
Buffett/Abel commentary on valuation and buyback discipline
Share price drawdowns that could make repurchases more attractive
predictions.rationale: With leadership transition and volatile markets, repurchases become plausible if management views intrinsic value as materially above market price.
